data.title: Advanced Drainage Systems issued Fiscal 2025 Sustainability Report, reaffirming commitment to environmental stewardship.
data.description: In Hilliard, Ohio, Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (ADS) (NYSE: WMS) unveiled its Fiscal 2025 Sustainability Report showcasing dedication to environmental stewardship. President and CEO, Scott Barbour, emphasized ADS's focus on water-related solutions, aiming to safeguard and regulate water resources. The report outlines the company's ongoing efforts towards sustainability.

data.title: SES AI completes acquisition of UZ Energy, becoming player in $300B ESS market.
data.description: WOBURN, Massachusetts-- SES AI Corporation, a prominent player in AI-enhanced high-performance Li-Metal and Li-ion batteries development and manufacturing, has successfully finalized the acquisition of Shenzen UZ Energy Co., Ltd., a top player in premium energy storage systems. This strategic move further solidifies SES AI in the competitive arena, opening doors for a robust presence in the substantial $300 billion global energy storage systems market.

data.title: kWh Analytics secures Wind Proxy Hedge for 79MW Apex Clean Energy project in Virginia with Munich Re, MUFG, and CIBC.
data.description: In San Francisco, kWh Analytics, a prominent in Climate Insurance, revealed the completion of a parametric Wind Proxy Hedge risk transfer deal for a 79MW wind project in Virginia by Apex Clean Energy. This pioneering deal involved leveraging kWh Analytics' Indifference Structure for debt sizing, with Munich Re providing the parametric hedge. Additionally, MUFG and CIBC acted as lenders for the project. The collaboration saw the successful implementation of a financial structure to mitigate risk for the wind project.
GOLD STEADIES AS TRADERS MULL OUTLOOK FOR FED’S RATE PATH

data.title: AECOM to host 2025 Investor Day on November 18, 2025 in NYC at NYSE to discuss long-term strategic plan and financial targets. CEO Troy Rudd to lead the presentation.
data.description: A global infrastructure leader, AECOM (NYSE:ACM), will hold its 2025 Investor Day at the New York Stock Exchange on November 18, 2025, starting at 10 a.m. Eastern Time. The event will showcase the company’s strategic plan and financial goals. Troy Rudd, AECOM’s chairman and CEO, will lead the presentation, highlighting initiatives aimed at transforming the company for future growth.

data.title: Pentair acquires Hydra-Stop LLC for $290 million from Madison Industries, with net transaction value around $240 million.
data.description: Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR) based in London, a prominent company in water management, has successfully finalized the acquisition of Hydra-Stop LLC from Madison Industries. The transaction, valued at around $290 million before adjustments, amounts to approximately $240 million after accounting for an expected $50 million tax benefit. Hydra-Stop, a notable player in the industry, is now under Pentair's umbrella, reinforcing their position in the market.

data.title: BDACS and Woori Bank introduce South Korea's inaugural won-backed stablecoin on Avalanche, adding to Asia's competitive stablecoin market.
data.description: In a significant development, South Korea has officially entered the competitive stablecoin market in Asia by launching its inaugural fully regulated stablecoin backed by the national currency, the won. With this move, South Korea now adds to the growing number of countries in the region entering the stablecoin race. This development underscores the increasing popularity and acceptance of stablecoins in the market, with the country joining the competition with its own unique offering. This announcement comes amid escalating interest in stablecoins, with its market showing significant growth. This move by South Korea is expected to further energize the stablecoin sector, with industry experts closely monitoring the impact of this new player in the market.
Swiss watchmakers fear for the future of their multi-billion dollar industry as Trump hits them with a 35% tariff.

data.title: Kimco Realty (NYSE: KIM) to announce Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 30. Join conference call for insights.
data.description: In Jericho, New York, Kimco Realty (NYSE: KIM) is set to disclose its third-quarter earnings on October 30, 2025, prior to the market opening. The invitation is open to all interested in joining the quarterly earnings conference call. On this date, pertinent financial details will be shared, and individuals can access the webcast for this information.

data.title: TELUS Digital files Circular for Special Meeting on Oct 27, 2025 with TELUS Corporation, ticker symbols TIXT, T, TU.
data.description: TELUS International (Cda) Inc. has disclosed that it submitted its management information circular for the upcoming special meeting of shareholders scheduled to be held online at 9:00 a.m. (Vancouver time) on October 27, 2025. This meeting will address the proposed arrangement with TELUS Corporation, with ticker symbols TSX: T and NYSE: TU. Shareholders will convene virtually to vote on the "Arrangement."

data.title: CZ issues warning as 'SEAL' team uncovers 60 phony IT staff tied to North Korea.譌C-60 impersonators exposed.
data.description: Changpeng Zhao issued a caution about North Korean hackers following an investigation by the white hat SEAL team, which revealed the profiles and aliases of 60 impostors.

data.title: DuPont outlines strategy and financial targets, introduces new portfolio post electronics spin-off. Estimated 3Q 2025: $2.98B in net sales, $805M operating EBITDA, $1.06 adjusted EPS; FY 2025: $6.86B net sales, $1.57B operating EBITDA. Medium-term targets: 3-4% organic sales CAGR, 150-200 bps EBITDA margin improvement, 8-10% adjusted EPS CAGR. Discloses plans for discontinuing Aramids and Qnity electronics businesses. (Kenneth Kwok / Shutterstock.com)
data.description: DuPont presented its new portfolio strategy during its 2025 Investor Day, following the intended spin-off of its electronics business, Qnity Electronics, Inc. The company emphasized a simplified, agile, and high-performing model focused on operational and commercial excellence to drive growth and free cash flow. It provided medium-term financial targets, including 3-4% organic sales growth CAGR, 150-200 basis points improvement in operating EBITDA margin, 8-10% adjusted EPS growth CAGR, and >90% free cash flow conversion by 2028. DuPont announced the recast of its 2025 financial guidance to reflect the divestiture of its Aramids business and Qnity Electronics. For Q3 2025, estimated net sales are $2.980 billion, with operating EBITDA of $805 million and adjusted EPS of $1.06 per share. For FY 2025, estimated net sales are $6.865 billion, and operating EBITDA is $1.575 billion. The company plans to finalize its adjusted EPS guidance during its third quarter 2025 earnings call. DuPont's transformed strategy aims at unlocking significant shareholder value by balancing targeted investments and cash returns, with a strong emphasis on innovation, operational excellence, and continuous improvement. CEO Lori Koch expressed confidence in the company's ability to deliver measurable results and drive profitable growth.
